title: AL's Raid Captains
description: A pack that gives Pillager and Vindicator Raid Captains helmets like in MC Dungeons!
body:
![Raid Captains logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d71d3c559f50c1d97f89d2d24aac79d2397a623e.png)

# 

This pack gives Pillager, Vindicator, and Evoker Raid Captains helmets like in MC Dungeons!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while having compatibility with several other popular resource packs!

 

Compatibility:

Note that not all packs are compatible, especially if they use custom entity models for Pillagers and Vindicators.

Packs that either only change textures or don't change mobs at all should be compatible. 

Here are some popular packs that are compatible as long as you follow the correct load-order given in the Images tab:

-Fresh Animations

-Bare Bones / Bare Bones x Fresh Animations

-Faithless

 

Note: The reason why it's compatible with Fresh Animations, despite FA using custom models, is because this pack uses the JPM system which is used by FA.

You can also reference the load orders given in the Images tab to know how to pair it with other packs.

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
